scroll_found.title: Research the Eye Black scroll at a Research Pedestal

subtitle.text: The hunt has opened. The chapter has not closed.

description: The Black Eye is in the frame.
The age has turned. The Eye Hunt is officially open.
Some require bosses you have not yet fought.
Some require ingredients from chapters you have not yet reached.
The the Eye Hunt chapter is not a chapter that ends.
It is the chapter that runs parallel to everything after it.
The Black Eye scroll documents what the Desert civilization left.
Not what they built. What they understood.
That death has a shape. That the shape can be inherited.
→ Have a Black Eye ready for the portal
